name: Mexican Pan Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 can kidney beans (or mexi-beans, black beans, whatever your fancy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray an iron skillet with cooking spray and add a little water. Heat the skillet.
3. Dice the onion and sauté it in the hot skillet.
4. Add chopped garlic to the skillet and stir.
5. In a bowl, mix together the beans, egg replacer (or egg whites), diced jalapenos, cumin, and corn meal until well combined and to your desired consistency.
6. Pour the bean mixture into the skillet, smooth the top, and bake for about 10 minutes.
7. Traditionally, this bread was topped with shredded cheddar cheese and sliced olives. It is also delicious without any toppings. Consider adding garnishes like thinly sliced red pepper rounds if you have a preference.
Note: Mexican Pan Bread is a versatile dish that can be enjoyed plain or with various toppings based on your taste preferences.
